summary: Predictive Safety Engine - COMPLETE. Backend: 18/18 tests PASSED. Frontend: All UI components verified (PredictiveAlertsPanel on dashboard, PredictiveRiskCard in device expansion). Live predictions working with 4 prediction types, proper threshold computation, and expandable trend charts.

issues: Recharts console warning: width(-1) and height(-1) - may be visible when charts render before container sizing

TestDevicePredictiveRisk.test_prediction_has_required_fields: PASS - score, type, window, confidence, explanation

PredictiveAlertsPanel_Dashboard.visibility: PASS - Panel visible on operator dashboard
PredictiveAlertsPanel_Dashboard.alert_items: PASS - DEV-001 Activity Declining, DEV-001 Health Decline, DEV-002 Health Decline
PredictiveAlertsPanel_Dashboard.badges_icons: PASS - Type badges (Activity Declining, Health Decline) with icons

PredictiveRiskCard_DeviceExpansion.visibility: PASS - Card visible below DigitalTwinCard in device expansion
PredictiveRiskCard_DeviceExpansion.header: PASS - 'Predictive Risk' header with '2 alerts' badge and '4 signals'
PredictiveRiskCard_DeviceExpansion.activity_decline: PASS - 100% risk, Alert badge, 24h window, 71% conf
PredictiveRiskCard_DeviceExpansion.health_decline: PASS - 100% risk, Alert badge, 72h window, 100% conf
PredictiveRiskCard_DeviceExpansion.explanations: PASS - Each prediction shows detailed explanation text
PredictiveRiskCard_DeviceExpansion.expandable_items: PASS - Items are clickable for trend charts

GET_predictive-alerts.note: Fleet alerts return from predictive_risks table. Initially 0 alerts until scheduler persists predictions with score >= 0.7 AND confidence >= 0.6

critical_code_review_comments: Backend predictive_engine.py correctly implements 4 prediction types with feature extraction from 7-day telemetry
Backend _extract_features() computes movement_trend_7d, interaction_trend_7d, wake_time_shift, activity_variance
Backend meets_alert_threshold correctly computed as score >= 0.7 AND confidence >= 0.6
Backend GET /devices/{id}/predictive-risk returns live_predictions with all required fields
Backend GET /predictive-alerts returns fleet-wide active alerts from predictive_risks table
Backend returns 404 for non-existent device ID
Backend scheduler registered in server.py startup (start_prediction_scheduler)
Frontend PredictiveAlertsPanel renders on operator dashboard with alert count badge
Frontend PredictiveRiskCard renders in device expansion below DigitalTwinCard
Frontend shows prediction icons, risk badges, confidence, window hours, and explanations
Frontend prediction items are expandable (chevron icon visible)
seed_data_creation: None - Used existing DEV-001 and DEV-002 historical data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Predictive Safety Engine fully tested. DEV-001 has 4 live predictions (activity_decline=100%[ALERT], sleep_disruption=47%, wandering_risk=50%, health_decline=100%[ALERT]). Fleet-wide predictive alerts panel shows on dashboard when predictions meeting threshold exist. PredictiveRiskCard shows in device expansion panel below DigitalTwinCard. Scheduler runs every 6h to persist predictions to predictive_risks table. Frontend shows icons per prediction type, Alert badges for threshold-meeting predictions, and expandable trend charts.
